text: A wounded traveller slumps against the wall, clutching a card. They look up at you with desperate eyes. "Please... take this, but leave me one of yours."

choices.label: Give a card
choices.outcome_text: You hand over a card. The traveller nods weakly and presses one into your hands in return.

choices.label: Refuse and walk past
choices.outcome_text: You step past them. Their eyes follow you, but they say nothing.

text: An ancient altar glows faintly in the corner. An inscription reads: "Offer blood, receive wisdom." Dried stains surround the stone.

choices.label: Touch the altar
choices.outcome_text: A sharp sting runs up your arm. Something ancient stirs, and a card materialises from the glow.

choices.label: Leave it alone
choices.outcome_text: You back away. Better not to disturb old things.

text: A scattering of coins glints on the floor. But something feels wrong — the air here is stale, and a faint groaning echoes nearby.

choices.label: Take the coins
choices.outcome_text: You pocket the coins. As you straighten up, something strikes you from behind. (-3 HP)

choices.label: Leave them
choices.outcome_text: You leave the coins and move on. Smart.

text: A cloaked figure steps from the shadows, hood drawn low. "A card for ten coins. No questions." They hold out an open palm.

choices.label: Buy (10 coins)
choices.outcome_text: The figure snatches the coins and drops a card into your hand, then vanishes.

choices.label: Decline
choices.outcome_text: You shake your head. The figure melts back into the shadows.

text: A loose stone in the wall catches your eye. It shifts easily — behind it, a small hollow holds a cache of coins left by some past explorer.

choices.label: Take the cache
choices.outcome_text: You pocket 20 coins. Not a bad find.

choices.label: Leave it
choices.outcome_text: You replace the stone and walk on.
